title: 100% Saturation Grass 1.8 -> 26.1.2
description: Modifies grass color by boosting saturation.
body:
## **👉 About the ResourcePack**

The 100% Saturation Grass mod is designed to enhance Minecraft's aesthetics by increasing the saturation and richness of grass colors. This mod brings a significant visual transformation to the world of Minecraft, making landscapes more vibrant and attractive.

Available on CurseForge : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/saturation-grass-100

**🙏 Please create an account for monetization 🙏**

---

### ⚙ Main features
🎨 Increased Saturation :

> Grass is rendered with brighter, more saturated colors.
Shades of green are accentuated.

🔗 Compatibility (1.1 Only):

> Compatibility with existing resource packs for a customized experience.

📈 Optimized performance (1.1 Only) :

> This mod is designed to be lightweight and not affect game performance.

> Compatible with most PC configurations, even the most modest.

---

### **💻 You don't yet know how to install resource packs ?**

1.Download the resourcespackresource the downloaded file or use a compatible launcher (modrinth and curseforge),

2.Windows + R Enter command "Appdata"

3.Go to Appdata/roaming/.minecraft/ressourcespack and paste the file,

4.Go to resource pack and select 100% Saturation Grass,

5.The pack is now installed on Minecraft !

---

### **Other**

Minecraft may tell you that the pack is not compatible, when in fact it is.
